author: yahya010
name: 10L Int6 QAT + BigramHash + Muon WD + Sliding Window
blurb: 10-layer 512dim SP-1024, STE int6 QAT (zero quant gap), full int6 [-31,31] + zstd-22, MLP hidden=1344, BigramHash 4096 buckets, fp16 tied embedding, Muon 0.99 with WD=0.02, LR 0.02, grad clip 0.3, warmdown 3000, sliding window stride=64.
